question: Assuming the bars for Saturday and Sunday represent missing readings rather than actual zero usage, what can we conclude about the average energy usage for the entire week?

options.A: About 22 kWh, computed from all seven bars
options.B: Unable to calculate a reliable weekly average because some days have missing data
options.C: The average is exactly 30 kWh because the bars look similar
options.D: About 31 kWh, using only days with non-zero values

explanation: The chart only shows measured values for the first part of the week; the remaining days are effectively missing, but are drawn as zero-height bars. Computing an average across all seven days (including those zeros) assumes the missing days truly had zero values, which is not supported by the data. Therefore the weekly average cannot be reliably calculated.
